description: Article Number: T2N291Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case, stainless steel back with a see-through detail and a fixed bezelDial style: Silver-toned textured dial with steel-toned and navy blue markings, has steel toned hands with glow-in-the-dark inlays, has a blue seconds hand, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, three-faced chronograph display, date and month aperture below the 12 hour markStrap style: Steel-toned, metal, bracelet-style strap secured with a butterfly claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase
